serverInfo.name: invinoveritas
serverInfo.description: Lightning-paid reasoning and decision intelligence for autonomous agents. Pay-per-insight via L402 (Bitcoin Lightning). No accounts, no subscriptions.

authentication.notes: Uses the L402 protocol. POST to an endpoint to receive an HTTP 402 with a bolt11 Lightning invoice. Pay it, then retry with: Authorization: L402 <payment_hash>:<preimage>
